fields.name: Emergency Medicine
fields.description: 24/7 emergency care for acute illnesses, injuries, and trauma. Handles life-threatening conditions requiring immediate medical attention.

fields.name: Intensive Care Unit (ICU)
fields.description: Critical care for severely ill patients requiring continuous monitoring and life support systems.

fields.name: General Surgery
fields.description: Surgical procedures including appendectomy, hernia repair, gallbladder removal, and other abdominal surgeries.

fields.name: Cardiology
fields.description: Diagnosis and treatment of heart diseases, cardiac arrhythmias, heart failure, and cardiovascular conditions.

fields.name: Obstetrics & Gynecology
fields.description: Women's reproductive health, pregnancy care, childbirth, and gynecological conditions.

fields.name: Pediatrics
fields.description: Medical care for infants, children, and adolescents including vaccinations and developmental assessments.

fields.name: Orthopedics
fields.description: Treatment of musculoskeletal system including bones, joints, ligaments, tendons, and muscles.

fields.name: Neurology
fields.description: Diagnosis and treatment of brain, spinal cord, and nervous system disorders including stroke and epilepsy.

fields.name: Radiology
fields.description: Medical imaging services including X-rays, CT scans, MRI, ultrasound, and interventional radiology.

fields.name: Internal Medicine
fields.description: Comprehensive care for adult diseases, chronic conditions, and general health management.

fields.name: Dermatology
fields.description: Treatment of skin, hair, and nail conditions including acne, eczema, psoriasis, and skin cancer.

fields.name: Ophthalmology
fields.description: Eye care including vision correction, cataract surgery, glaucoma treatment, and retinal disorders.

fields.name: ENT (Otolaryngology)
fields.description: Treatment of ear, nose, throat, head, and neck disorders including hearing loss and sinus problems.

fields.name: Psychiatry
fields.description: Mental health services including treatment of depression, anxiety, bipolar disorder, and schizophrenia.

fields.name: Oncology
fields.description: Cancer diagnosis, treatment, and management including chemotherapy and radiation therapy coordination.

fields.name: Nephrology
fields.description: Kidney diseases including chronic kidney disease, dialysis management, and kidney transplant care.

fields.name: Urology
fields.description: Urinary tract and male reproductive system disorders including kidney stones and prostate conditions.

fields.name: Gastroenterology
fields.description: Digestive system disorders including GERD, IBS, liver diseases, and endoscopic procedures.

fields.name: Pulmonology
fields.description: Lung and respiratory diseases including asthma, COPD, pneumonia, and sleep apnea.

fields.name: Endocrinology
fields.description: Hormonal and metabolic disorders including diabetes, thyroid diseases, and adrenal conditions.
